title: stelis laplanadensis
intro: Stelis laplanadensis, also known as the orchid Stelis, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the orchid family. Traditionally, Stelis laplanadensis has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Stelis laplanadensis may include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to aid in wound healing and reduce fever. In herbal preparations, Stelis laplanadensis is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, and is also used in traditional medicine to make topical creams and ointments.
